bodyHead: {"created":1778219212,"data":[{"revised_prompt":"Photorealistic high-fashion luxury Japanese editorial campaign image, square 1024x1024. Lamp light passes through sheer organza to create a luminous warm silhouette glow, extreme shadow ratio, cinematic deep blacks, visible lamp bokeh orb in the right background.
